properties.mapping Procedure1_OffsetUnit:
SELECT 	'SAS_lungCancer' AS datasetId,
		'day' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		'None' AS originalValue,
		'Procedure1_OffsetUnit' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Procedure1_OffsetUnit" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Dataset:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Dataset_Identifier" AS Title,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Procedure1_ProcedureCode:
SELECT 	'SAS_lungCancer' AS datasetId,
		'Fine needle biopsy' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		'None' AS originalValue,
		'Procedure1_ProcedureCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Procedure1_ProcedureCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Patient_BirthSex:
SELECT 	'SAS_lungCancer' AS datasetId,
		'Sex' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Sex" AS originalValue,
		'Patient_BirthSex' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Patient:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		'Patient with Cancer' AS	DiagnosticCategoryOriginal,
		"Sex" AS BirthSexOriginal,
        "Patient_BirthSex" AS BirthSexEucaim,
		"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping ImagingProcedure1_OffsetUnit:
SELECT 	'SAS_lungCancer' AS datasetId,
		'day' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		'None' AS originalValue,
		'ImagingProcedure1_OffsetUnit' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "ImagingProcedure1_OffsetUnit" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Episode:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Dataset_Identifier" AS DatasetIdentifier,
		"Episode1_Name" AS Identifier,
		"Episode1_Type" AS	TypeOriginal,
		"Episode1_Number" AS EpisodeNumber,
		0 as processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureCode:
SELECT 	'SAS_lungCancer' AS datasetId,
		'Axial scan mode' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		'None' AS originalValue,
		'ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Radiotherapy1_RadiotherapyCode:
SELECT 	'SAS_lungCancer' AS datasetId,
		'Radiotherapy - type' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Radiotherapy - type" AS originalValue,
		'Radiotherapy1_RadiotherapyCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Radiotherapy1_RadiotherapyCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Procedure1:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Procedure1_ProcedureIdentifier" AS	ProcedureIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"Procedure1_OffsetFromDiagnosis" AS OffsetFromDiagnosis,
		'Day' AS OffsetUnitOriginal,
        "Procedure1_OffsetUnit" AS OffsetUnitEUCAIM,
		'Fine needle biopsy' AS ProcedureOriginal,
		"Procedure1_ProcedureCode" AS ProcedureEUCAIM,
		0 as processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Primary Cancer Condition:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		CAST(REPLACE("PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeAtDiagnosis", ',', '.') AS DOUBLE) AS AgeOfDiagnosis,
		'Year' AS AgeUnitOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitConcept" AS AgeUnitEUCAIM,
		"Cancer type" AS BodySiteOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode" AS BodySiteEUCAIM,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_ConfirmedByProcedure" AS ConfirmedByProcedure,
		"Episode1_Number" AS EpisodeNumber,
		"Tumor histology/morphology" AS HistologyMorphologyBehaviourOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode" AS HistologyMorphologyBehaviourEUCAIM,
		0 as processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteC:
SELECT 	'SAS_lungCancer' AS datasetId,
		'Cancer type' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Cancer type" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.Tumor:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" || '_tumor_1' AS Identifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"Cancer type" AS BodySiteOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_BodySiteCode" AS BodySiteEUCAIM,
		"Episode1_Number" AS Episode,
		"Tumor histology/morphology" AS morphologyOriginal,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode" AS morphologyEUCAIM,
		0 as processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.RadiotherapyProcedure1:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"Radiotherapy1_ProcedureIdentifier" AS TreatmentIdentifier,
		"Radiotherapy1_OffsetFromDiagnosis" AS OffsetFromDiagnosis,
		'Day' AS OffsetUnitOriginal,
        "Radiotherapy1_OffsetUnit" AS OffsetUnitEUCAIM,
		"Radiotherapy - type" AS RadiotherapyOriginal,
		"Radiotherapy1_RadiotherapyCode" AS RadiotherapyEUCAIM,
		0 as processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_Histology:
SELECT 	'SAS_lungCancer' AS datasetId,
		'Tumor histology/morphology' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		"Tumor histology/morphology" AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_HistologyMorphologyBehaviourCode" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.ImagingProcedure1:
SELECT 	"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureIdentifier" AS	ProcedureIdentifier,
		"PrimaryCancerCondition_Identifier" AS PrimaryCancerConditionIdentifier,
		"ImagingProcedure1_OffsetFromDiagnosis" AS OffsetFromDiagnosis,
		'Day' AS OffsetUnitOriginal,
        "ImagingProcedure1_OffsetUnit" AS OffsetUnitEUCAIM,
		'Axial scan mode' AS ImagingProcedureOriginal,
		"ImagingProcedure1_ProcedureCode" AS ImagingProcedureEUCAIM,
		0 as processed
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitCo:
SELECT 	'SAS_lungCancer' AS datasetId,
		'Year' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		'None' AS originalValue,
		'PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitConcept' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "PrimaryCancerCondition_AgeUnitConcept" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE
properties.mapping Radiotherapy1_OffsetUnit:
SELECT 	'SAS_lungCancer' AS datasetId,
		'day' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		'None' AS originalValue,
		'Radiotherapy1_OffsetUnit' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "Radiotherapy1_OffsetUnit" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp
FROM FLOWFILE

labels.label:
Loop 03 for clinical data (SAS lung dataset):
* Clinical data input normalized and curated is loaded and converted to a relational model.
* Specific mappings are specified during the Data Holder's analysis phase.
Steps:
1. Read normalized and curated csv file and apply structural mapping preparation
2. Apply lookups for coded values
3. Write values transformed to EUCAIM CDM and hyperontology to ingestion database
